constraint_a.statement: The regeneration should repair the target beat's color problem.

constraint_b.statement: The target beat must remain valid inside the surrounding arc progression.

questions.tension: A color change can fix the target beat but break the surrounding arc trajectory.
questions.failure_scenario: The regenerated beat becomes visually correct in isolation and structurally false in sequence.
resolution_demands: Describe the intended color delta for the target beat.
Name the precedence rule that decides local repair versus sequence continuity.
Confirm that neighboring beat relationships still hold.
downstream_proof: Show that arc-stage PAD progression still passes sequence thresholds.

downstream_consumer.expected_input: A regenerated beat whose color repair still fits sequence continuity.
downstream_consumer.failure_mode: Editor writes a locally improved beat that breaks the approved emotional arc.

automated_checks.repair_hint: Reduce color drift or adjust the regeneration target so sequence PAD continuity remains valid.

constraint_a.statement: The requested fix may require a material expressive change in the target beat.

constraint_b.statement: Regeneration must remain surgical and avoid collateral changes outside the target scope.

questions.tension: The request needs a stronger expressive change, but regeneration must stay surgical.
questions.failure_scenario: A local fix spills into non-target beats or rewrites approved motion decisions.
resolution_demands: Name the exact target fields that may change.
Name the precedence rule that limits expressive repair when scope containment is threatened.
State which dependent fields are allowed to update for continuity.

downstream_consumer.expected_input: A patch whose path set is explicitly contained to allowed mutation scope.
downstream_consumer.failure_mode: The canonical manifest absorbs unintended neighbor changes.

automated_checks.repair_hint: Limit the patch to target-beat media and dependent continuity fields only.

constraint_a.statement: The visual regeneration should improve the target beat immediately.

constraint_b.statement: Caption and audio bindings must remain valid or be explicitly recomputed before commit.

questions.tension: A visual regeneration can silently break existing caption and audio timing.
questions.failure_scenario: The regenerated beat looks better but no longer lands on the intended words or music accents.
resolution_demands: State whether timing remains preserved or must be recomputed.
Name the precedence rule that decides between immediate patch commit and timing recompute.
List which timing assets need refresh if not preserved.
downstream_proof: Confirm caption and audio offsets remain inside allowed timing bands.

downstream_consumer.expected_input: A decision that either preserves timing legally or triggers recompute before manifest commit.
downstream_consumer.failure_mode: Editor accepts a beat that visually improves while audio and captions become false.

automated_checks.repair_hint: Trigger caption_timing_adjust or audio retime before accepting the regenerated beat.

constraint_a.statement: The regenerated beat must be written back into the canonical project file.

constraint_b.statement: Fingerprint history and non-target beat locks must survive the update intact.

questions.tension: The canonical manifest must change, but provenance and approved neighbors must remain auditable.
questions.failure_scenario: The edit is accepted with missing fingerprint history or unlocked neighboring seeds.
resolution_demands: Name the precedence rule that prevents a manifest write when auditability is incomplete.
Confirm all non-target beats remain locked.
downstream_proof: Attach the regeneration history update and neighbor lock confirmation to the Constraint Resolution Manifest.

downstream_consumer.expected_input: A manifest update request with preserved provenance and stable neighbor locks.
downstream_consumer.failure_mode: The audit chain breaks and approved neighbors lose determinism.

automated_checks.repair_hint: Log superseded fingerprint metadata before writing the new asset back to the manifest.
